issues.fix_suggestion: Remove the default GB frame/titleblock and render only the compact reference-style sheet fields before screenshot review.
issues.description: The same-name reference policy forbids default template/titleblock artifacts, but the generated titlebar region still looks like a large template grid.

issues.fix_suggestion: Reduce redundant dimension placement and follow reference-specific dimension grouping.
issues.description: Dimension visual candidates appear too dense for the blueprint baseline.

issues.fix_suggestion: Arrange reference-intent dimensions into readable lanes around the learned view layout; reject clustered AutoDimension-like output.
issues.description: Dimension text candidates are clustered into a small local region, matching the UI screenshot readability failure.

issues.fix_suggestion: Align generated layout to the same-name reference and rerun application UI screenshot review.
issues.description: Generated PNG screenshot-grid ink layout differs from the same-name reference PNG.

generated_png_source_evidence.acceptance_rule: For LB26001-A-04-006/007/008/009/015/022, Drawing Review UI evidence must use the generated PNG from the current run_dir; stale drw_output/v5 images are diagnostic only.

issues.fix_suggestion: Open the generated and same-name reference drawings in the application Drawing Review UI, capture a screenshot, and record a passing manual judgement before acceptance.
issues.description: DrawingBlueprint requires application UI screenshot review; no passing manual UI judgement is attached.

required_notes: 总长和装配关键尺寸为重点检验尺寸。
